Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Troy Houchins To Perpetuate Testimony Of Larry Houchins By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for moving party and Petitioner Larry Houcins.

RULING: PETITION OF TROY HOUCHINS TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF LARRY HOUCHINS BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION
Hearing held, not argued and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Troy Houchins to Perpetuate Testimony of Larry Houchins by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED. Proof of service filed as to Defendants W.R. Thomason Inc. and Marconi Plastering Company Inc. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
